assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches claude-md-configured.md line 16 exactly (Role: 'Rust backend service', Serena Instance: 'serena_backend', Path: '/home/user/trustify-backend').

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new entry with Serena Instance 'serena_ui' is present.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 12-16 show: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747 — all match claude-md-configured.md lines 19-23 exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has '## Preserved' section with four '**PRESERVED**' items (trustify-backend entry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) and '## Added' section with two '**ADDED**' items (trustify-ui entry, serena_ui limitation). Also has '## Not Added' section for Security Configuration.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 5: '**serena_backend**: Already configured in the Repository Registry (trustify-backend, Rust backend service, /home/user/trustify-backend). No changes needed.' Line 6: '**serena_ui**: Newly discovered from the MCP tool listing.'

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-34: naming convention 'mcp__<instance>__<tool>' preserved (line 20), serena_backend find_symbol example preserved (lines 24-28), serena_backend limitation 'rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use' preserved (line 33). Only addition is line 34: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 36-40: '## Bug Configuration' with 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' — all unchanged from claude-md-configured.md lines 43-47. discovery-log.md line 18: 'Bug Configuration is up to date. All three fields present and unchanged.'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 21-22: 'Security Configuration opt-in was offered (the existing CLAUDE.md has no Security Configuration section). User declined — Security Configuration section was not added.' changes-log.md line 17: '**NOT ADDED**: Security Configuration (user declined opt-in)'. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section.
